products.name: Organic Heirloom Seed Box
products.description: A curated box of 12 vegetable and herb seed packets, all organic, open-pollinated, and non-GMO. Includes planting guides.

products.name: Bokashi Indoor Compost Kit
products.description: Ferment food waste in your kitchen without smells. Kit includes double-bucket container and 1kg of active Bokashi bran.

products.name: Reusable Organic Cotton Produce Bags
products.description: Pack of 5 mesh and muslin bags with drawstrings. Completely biodegradable and washable. Zero waste packaging.

products.name: Handcrafted Bamboo Mason Bee House
products.description: Provide a safe nesting environment for native pollinators. Made from sustainable bamboo and local reclaimed timber.

products.name: Stainless Steel Bento Lunchbox
products.description: Double-tier leakproof design with adjustable compartments. Keep your lunch fresh and reduce plastic wrap usage.

products.name: Artisanal Sourdough Starter Kit
products.description: Everything needed to bake sourdough: dehydrated 100-year heirloom starter, organic flour, proofing basket, and dough whisk.

workshops.name: Introduction to Composting
workshops.description: Learn the magic of turning kitchen scraps and garden waste into rich black gold. We cover hot, cold, and vermicomposting systems.

workshops.name: Urban Farming & Container Gardening
workshops.description: Maximize small spaces to grow your own salad crops, root crops, and fruiting bushes in pots, window boxes, and hanging baskets.

workshops.name: Zero-Waste Plant-Based Cooking
workshops.description: Create gourmet meals utilizing standard pantry items, vegetable scraps, and local herbs. Tips on storing, fermentation, and menu planning.

workshops.name: Permaculture Design Principles
workshops.description: Discover earth care, people care, and fair share ethics. Map out zones, identify water capture paths, and design food forests.

workshops.name: Microgreens and Sprouting at Home
workshops.description: Grow nutritional powerhouses inside your home in just 7 days. Learn about tray preparation, lighting, and watering.

workshops.name: Eco-Friendly DIY Home Care
workshops.description: Make your own non-toxic kitchen sprays, laundry detergent, and dish soaps using simple ingredients like vinegar, soda, and essential oils.

events.title: Summer Harvest Community Festival
events.description: Celebrate the community yield with live folk music, local food stalls, eco crafts, and organic farming demonstrations. Fun for all ages!

events.title: Community Garden Workday
events.description: Roll up your sleeves and help prepare new raised beds, plant organic fruit trees, and paint the compost bins. Free hot lunch provided for all helpers.

events.title: Autumn Seed and Plant Swap
events.description: Bring your surplus seeds, vegetable seedlings, houseplant cuttings, and gardening books to swap. Share knowledge and varieties with local growers.

events.title: Eco-Living Farmers Market
events.description: Browse rows of organic vegetables, cold-pressed fruit juices, vegan cheeses, zero-waste cosmetic bars, and green energy advice tables.
